description: eNanoMapper is a nanosafety data and ontology platform for managing, searching, and sharing nanomaterial characterization, biological, and toxicological data. Its website links to a public data database and related scientific tooling operated by the project and partners.
summary: enanomapper.net exposes one documented HTTP REST API for the public eNanoMapper data service at https://data.enanomapper.net; no GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surfaced in public docs.
